languages.text: "Отнюдь. Это рассчитанный риск ради эксперимента, важность которого многократно превосходит возможные осложнения. Я весьма тщательно контролирую процедуру, так что опасаться нечего".

"Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."
languages.original_text: "Отнюдь. Это рассчитанный риск ради эксперимента, важность которого многократно превосходит возможные осложнения. Я весьма тщательно контролирую процедуру, так что опасаться нечего".

traits.locale_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

"Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

"Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

"Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

languages.text: 「とんでもありません。これは、起こりうるいかなる合併症をも何倍も上回る重要性を持つ実験のために負う、計算されたリスクなのです。私は手技の監督に細心の注意を払っていますので、案ずるには及びません」
languages.original_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

traits.locale_text: 「とんでもありません。これは、起こりうるいかなる合併症をも何倍も上回る重要性を持つ実験のために負う、計算されたリスクなのです。私は手技の監督に細心の注意を払っていますので、案ずるには及びません」

languages.text: “远非如此。这是经过审慎权衡、为了实验而冒的风险，其重要性远超任何可能出现的并发症。我一直在谨慎地监督整个程序，所以大家不必惊慌。”
languages.original_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

traits.locale_text: “远非如此。这是经过审慎权衡、为了实验而冒的风险，其重要性远超任何可能出现的并发症。我一直在谨慎地监督整个程序，所以大家不必惊慌。”

languages.text: "Bei weitem nicht. Es ist ein kalkuliertes Risiko im Sinne eines Experiments, dessen Bedeutung alle möglichen Komplikationen um ein Vielfaches überwiegt. Ich lasse bei der Überwachung der Prozedur größte Sorgfalt walten. Es besteht also kein Grund zur Sorge ...
languages.original_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

traits.locale_text: "Bei weitem nicht. Es ist ein kalkuliertes Risiko im Sinne eines Experiments, dessen Bedeutung alle möglichen Komplikationen um ein Vielfaches überwiegt. Ich lasse bei der Überwachung der Prozedur größte Sorgfalt walten. Es besteht also kein Grund zur Sorge ...

languages.text: « Mais pas du tout. Il s'agit d'un risque calculé pris dans le cadre d'une expérience dont l'importance surpasse de très loin toutes les complications possibles. Je surveille la procédure avec le plus grand soin. Il n'y a aucune raison de s'inquiéter. »
languages.original_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

traits.locale_text: « Mais pas du tout. Il s'agit d'un risque calculé pris dans le cadre d'une expérience dont l'importance surpasse de très loin toutes les complications possibles. Je surveille la procédure avec le plus grand soin. Il n'y a aucune raison de s'inquiéter. »

languages.text: «En absoluto. Es un riesgo calculado en nombre de un experimento cuya importancia supera con creces cualquier complicación posible. Ejerzo sumo cuidado al supervisar el proceso, por lo que no tiene por qué alarmarse».
languages.original_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

traits.locale_text: «En absoluto. Es un riesgo calculado en nombre de un experimento cuya importancia supera con creces cualquier complicación posible. Ejerzo sumo cuidado al supervisar el proceso, por lo que no tiene por qué alarmarse».

languages.text: "Alakası yok. Bu, önemi olası herhangi bir komplikasyonu katbekat aşan bir deney uğruna alınmış hesaplı bir risk. Prosedürü denetlerken büyük bir özen gösteriyorum, bu yüzden endişelenmeye mahal yok."
languages.original_text: "Far from it. It is a calculated risk taken for the sake of an experiment whose importance surpasses any possible complications many times over. I exercise great diligence in overseeing the procedure, so there is no cause for alarm."

traits.locale_text: "Alakası yok. Bu, önemi olası herhangi bir komplikasyonu katbekat aşan bir deney uğruna alınmış hesaplı bir risk. Prosedürü denetlerken büyük bir özen gösteriyorum, bu yüzden endişelenmeye mahal yok."
